name: Royal Toast Triangles
recipeIngredient: 1 8-oz. can Pillsbury Refrigerated Quick Crescent Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2 Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3 Separate the dough into 8 triangles and cut each triangle in half lengthwise, forming 16 pieces.
4 Place the dough pieces on the prepared cookie sheet.
5 Brush lightly with Spicy French Dressing.
6 Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
Easy to prepare and fit for a king!
